title:
Canada Consumer
Price Index Report
subtitle:
Special Profitability
on EUR/USD
text-1: Canadian inflation is expected to have fallen below the central bank’s medium-term target over this past month.  BOC officials went as far as to say that the factors that have kept the inflation up in past months were only “temporary,” and the CPI readings could take another dip.
text-2: Should the figures published this Friday come in below the expectations, it could be taken as a bearish sign for the Canadian dollar.
note-text: You can find the latest market overviews and forecasts on the IQ Option blog.
asterisk: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment. The offer is valid on April 21 from 11:30 to 13:30 GMT.

new.title: UK’s Consumer Price Index (CPI) Report
new.subtitle:
Increased profitability
on EUR/GBP
new.text-1: Consumer Price Index is a measure of inflation for the United Kingdom. A higher than expected reading may be a bearish sign for the Pound as it indicates that inflationary pressures are not easing up. In fact, inflation is currently at its highest level in nearly four years.
new.text-2: Traders are holding their breath: how will the Pound behave once the CPI figures are published?
new.text-3: You can turn this occasion into a trading opportunity with special 91%* profitability on EUR/USD
new.text-4: You be the judge! Make a short-term prediction about the price of Apple with Binary Options or speculate on the long-term outlook with Classic Options.
new.material: This material is not an investment advice
